mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, u.email AS rentedByEmail, u.department AS rentedByDepartment, t.user_id AS rentedByUserId, t.due_date AS dueDate FROM asset a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT asset_id, MAX(id) AS latest_tx_id FROM `transaction` WHERE type = 'RENT' GROUP BY asset_id ) latest ON a.id = latest.asset_id AND a.status = 'RENTED' LEFT JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = latest.latest_tx_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id
a.use_yn = 'Y'
AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR a.serial_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
AND a.status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM asset WHERE id = #{id} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset (category_id, name, serial_number, status, location, image_url, use_yn) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{serialNumber}, #{status}, #{location}, #{imageUrl}, 'Y')

INSERT INTO asset (category_id, name, serial_number, status, location, image_url, use_yn) VALUES
(#{asset.categoryId}, #{asset.name}, #{asset.serialNumber}, #{asset.status}, #{asset.location}, #{asset.imageUrl}, 'Y')
mapper.update: UPDATE asset SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, location = #{location}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE asset SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'RENTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REPAIRING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as repairing FROM asset WHERE use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT a.*, t.due_date as dueDate FROM asset a JOIN ( SELECT asset_id, MAX(id) as latest_tx_id FROM `transaction` WHERE type = 'RENT' GROUP BY asset_id ) latest ON a.id = latest.asset_id JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = latest.latest_tx_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.type = 'RENT' AND a.status = 'RENTED' AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
